title: Aweris system
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Taboon system}} {{System |image=[[File:Aweris_system.jpg]] |name=Aweris system |region=*[[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square O-10 in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. |sector=*[[Airon sector/Legends|Airon sector]] **[[Stenness Node]]{{FactFile|11|PLA 7-8|Planets of the Inner Rim}} |coordinates=O-10 |xyz= |quadrants= |suns=1: [[Awer]]''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' |orbits=#[[Taboon]] #*Many [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Vo Dasha]] |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes=[[Lesser Lantillian Route]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |other= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |population= |imports= |exports=[[Taboon hardwood]][[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]] |affiliation=[[Bogga's criminal empire]] }} {{Quote|Th-the Hutt? Whatcha talkin' about? Ain't no ''Hutts'' in this ''system''!''"
"''Nudd tchaa! Wrong warthead—Great Bogga is ''crime boss'' of the Stenness worlds—and he's going to be really ''pleased'' to meet ''you''!|[[Finhead Stonebone]] and [[Grimorg]]|[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]]}} The '''Aweris system''', later known as the '''Taboon system''', was located along the border of the [[Stenness Node]]. It centered around the yellow [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Awer]], which was orbited by the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Taboon]]. {{System-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' {{1stID|Aweris system}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{ID|Taboon system}} *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} {{ID|Taboon system}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Airon sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Lesser Lantillian Route]] [[Category:Star systems in the Inner Rim]] [[Category:Star systems in the Slice]]
